issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. The effect states 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck', not from hand. Should use a deck-trashing action (e.g., TrashFromDeck or equivalent mechanism).
Rest action is mandatory in DSL but text says 'You may rest'. Should include 'optional:true' to reflect the optional nature of the rest condition.

KO action should also be conditional on the rest being performed, or the entire effect chain should be wrapped in an optional condition. The 'may' applies to the rest, which gates the subsequent effects.
